settings.tools.approval.description: Per-tool approval policies. Set to 'allow' to auto-approve, 'prompt' to require confirmation, or 'deny' to block. 覆盖 are honored in every approval mode.
settings.tools.approval.label: 工具审批策略
settings.tools.approvalMode.description: 默认 approval behavior for tool calls. '始终 ask' auto-approves read-only tools only. 'Write' auto-approves read and workspace-write tools. 'Yolo' auto-approves all tiers; user policy may still prompt or block.
settings.tools.approvalMode.label: 工具审批
settings.tools.approvalMode.options.alwa: 自动-approve read-only tools; require confirmation for write and exec tools.
settings.tools.approvalMode.options.writ: 自动-approve read-only and write tools; require confirmation for exec tools such as bash, eval, browser, task, and ssh.
settings.tools.approvalMode.options.yolo: 自动-approve read, write, and exec tools. User policy can still require confirmation or block calls.
